inputs.label: Gross Pay per Period
inputs.businessContext: Enter the gross pay for the pay period

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the gross pay for the pay period
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ödeme dönemi için brüt ücreti girin
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie das Bruttogehalt für den Abrechnungszeitraum ein
businessContext_i18n.fr: Saisissez le salaire brut pour la période de paie
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el salario bruto para el período de pago

inputs.label: Employee SS Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Social security tax rate for employee (e.g., 6.2%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Social security tax rate for employee (e.g., 6.2%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan için sosyal güvenlik vergisi oranı (örn. %6,2)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition de la sécurité sociale pour l'employé (ex. 6,2%)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto de seguridad social para el empleado (ej. 6.2%)

inputs.label: Employer SS Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Social security tax rate for employer (e.g., 6.2%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Social security tax rate for employer (e.g., 6.2%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşveren için sosyal güvenlik vergisi oranı (örn. %6,2)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition de la sécurité sociale pour l'employeur (ex. 6,2%)

businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة الضمان الاجتماعي لصاحب العمل (مثال: 6.2%)

inputs.label: Annual Wage Ceiling
inputs.businessContext: Maximum amount of annual earnings subject to social security tax

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum amount of annual earnings subject to social security tax
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sosyal güvenlik vergisine tabi yıllık kazancın azami tutarı
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Jahresverdienst, der der Sozialversicherung unterliegt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant maximum des gains annuels soumis à la taxe de sécurité sociale

inputs.label: Pay Periods per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of pay periods per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 26 for bi-weekly)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of pay periods per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 26 for bi-weekly)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık ödeme dönemi sayısı (örn. aylık için 12, iki haftada bir için 26)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Auszahlungen pro Jahr (z. B. 12 monatlich, 26 zweiwöchentlich)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de paie par an (ex. 12 pour mensuel, 26 pour bimensuel)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de períodos de pago por año (ej. 12 para mensual, 26 para quincenal)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد فترات الدفع في السنة (مثال: 12 للشهري، 26 لنصف الشهري)
